notes.note:
The home screen no longer shows the "You're protected" tracking message until Firefox has blocked trackers. ([Bug 2049564][1])


  [1]: https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2049564

Fixed an overly sensitive toolbar swipe gesture that could unexpectedly open the tabs tray while scrolling or swiping in content and search results. ([Bug 2037701][1], [Bug 2046696][2])


  [1]: http://%20https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2037701
  [2]: https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2046696

text:
Thanks for using Firefox! Have feedback or suggestions? Join the conversation on [Mozilla Connect][1]. Need help? Our volunteer support community has you covered on [Mozilla Support][2] 

[1]: https://connect.mozilla.org/
[2]: https://mzl.la/AndroidSupport
title: Firefox for Android 152.0.4 Release
